title: Audit Partner
description:
Job Description & Requirements

We are looking for an experienced Audit Partner to join our dynamic team, bringing a wealth of technical expertise and strategic leadership to our audit practice. With a solid track record of managing complex audit engagements, this role is perfect for a professional who thrives in a fast-paced environment and is dedicated to maintaining high-quality standards.

As a qualified Audit Partner, you will also have the authority and responsibility to sign off on audit reports, ensuring full compliance with statutory regulations and professional standards.

Roles & Responsibilities:

  • Provide expert oversight in all auditing areas, ensuring adherence to IFRS, SFRS, and statutory regulations.
  • Conduct comprehensive risk assessments and establish effective audit strategies and procedures.
  • Lead, mentor, and develop a high-performing audit team, ensuring quality delivery and achieving budget targets.
  • Evaluate audit evidence to draw informed conclusions and address complex audit objectives.
  • Review and update audit policies and procedures, staying aligned with professional standards and best practices.
  • Manage a diverse client portfolio, fostering strong, long-term client relationships.
  • Respond to technical queries from clients and internal teams, offering guidance on audit and compliance matters.
  • Drive business development initiatives to expand the practice’s reach and impact.

Job Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting; Chartered Accountant Singapore (Practicing Member) with signing authority.
  • Extensive Big Four audit experience is highly advantageous.
  • Minimum 10 years of relevant experience, with at least 5 years as an Audit Partner in a mid-tier audit firm.
  • Ability to sign audit reports and ensure all engagements comply with regulatory requirements.
  • Mandarin proficiency is vital to liaise with Mandarin-speaking clients.
